creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
(In reply to Jochen Neumeister from comment #2)

I have just done so, but I would point out that I have submitted sequences of diffs like this before without issues, see PR#229315.  Is it no longer possible to run multiple patches?

May I ask why these take so long to be committed?  It has been a week now since I submitted the 4.11.2 update and, in that time, several minor changes have been made to the PR itself, but the patch was not yet committed.  I do my best to ensure that the patches pass portlint and check-plist in order for it to be possible to commit them without issues.  Is there something else I should be doing in order to ensure quicker committing?
